objective: Long session covering three major feature areas: External Tools launchpad (per-user curated shortcuts to web/desktop/CLI/file tools with Run-as-Admin + shell choice), Services Monitor card with Start/Stop/Restart + Restart All (backed by System.ServiceProcess.ServiceController targeting a configurable Novarad server host), and a complete rework of the Orders tab to a 1:1 Procedure tab with grouped PACS/RIS field mapping, full inline editing, a TipTap rich-text editor for reports and notes, a Physicians autocomplete picker, a Sites picker, and real Novarad workflow-step semantics.

current_task.description: Session 14 (2026-04-23): Shipped Standard Procedures CRUD + CSV/Excel import/template, 'Use Standard Procedure' picker on Procedure tab and Description sync row, Refinalize button on Reports tab that re-pushes report text into pacs.preliminary_report_map and updates procedure_status, and HIPAA lock on Final Signed reports (Type/Status/ReportText read-only; Notes+custom stay editable; text still copyable).
